content_body:
Blue Ridge is a haven for families looking to escape into the mountains and create unforgettable memories. Located in the serenity of North Georgia, Blue Ridge is brimming with outdoor activities perfect for kids of all ages. Whether your little adventurers enjoy chasing waterfalls, panning for gems, or experiencing the thrill of ziplining, Blue Ridge offers endless opportunities for family fun and outdoor exploration.

From family-friendly Blue Ridge hikes and waterfront adventures to adrenaline-packed aerial courses and encounters with rescued chimpanzees, Blue Ridge is an outdoor playground waiting to be explored. If you are planning a family getaway and want to keep your kids engaged in the outdoors, check out these top outdoor activities for kids in Blue Ridge, GA that are sure to bring smiles and excitement to your vacation. 

Family-Friendly Blue Ridge Hikes

One of the best ways to introduce kids to the great outdoors is through hiking, and Blue Ridge has many family-friendly trails perfect for little legs. Hiking helps young ones develop an appreciation for nature, gets them moving, and provides a great opportunity for family bonding. The following trails offer easy, scenic routes that will leave your kids excited for their next adventure.

  • The Swinging Bridge on the Toccoa River

The Swinging Bridge is one of the most iconic hiking destinations in North Georgia. This 270-foot-long suspension bridge provides a thrilling adventure for kids. The short 0.5-mile trail leading to the bridge is very manageable for young hikers, and the scenic views of the Toccoa River make it a perfect spot for a family photo. The gentle swaying of the bridge adds an extra element of excitement that children will love. 

  • Fall Branch Falls

If your kids love waterfalls, Fall Branch Falls is a must-visit. The easy 0.5-mile trail takes families through lush forests to a stunning cascading waterfall. Kids will love exploring the rocks at the base of the falls while parents enjoy the deck overlooking the views. It’s a great introduction to hiking for beginners and offers plenty of opportunities for outdoor play. 

Unlock Your Inner Prospector with Gem Mining

For kids who love hands-on activities, Blue Ridge offers interactive experiences that allow them to dig, discover, and create. These gem mining experiences are perfect for curious minds who enjoy exploring the world around them.

  • The Lilly Pad Village

Located in the Aska Adventure Area, The Lilly Pad Village is a fantastic spot for younger children to enjoy mini-golf, gem mining, and fishing in a stocked pond. The gem mining experience is a favorite among kids, as they sift through silt to uncover sparkling treasures like quartz and amethyst. The village also offers fishing gear for children, making it a great place to introduce little ones to the joys of fishing in a calm environment.

  • Aska Gem Mining Company

Another fantastic spot for treasure hunting is the Aska Mining Company, where families can pan for gemstones and fossils. Both educational and exciting, this activity allows kids to learn about different types of rocks while uncovering hidden gems to take home as souvenirs. Staff members are on hand to help children identify their discoveries, turning this into a learning experience that sparks an interest in geology and natural history.

Wild Encounters at Project Chimps Sanctuary

For a unique outdoors experience, visit Project Chimps, a sanctuary that provides a forever home for retired research chimpanzees. Families can take guided tours to learn about the chimps' stories and how they are cared for in their natural mountain habitat. This unique adventure offers a mix of education and wildlife observation, perfect for young animal lovers.

Kids will be fascinated by the chimpanzees’ behaviors and social interactions, providing a rare glimpse into the lives of these intelligent primates. The sanctuary also provides a variety of hiking trails, allowing you to stroll through the sanctuary and possibly catch a glimpse of a chimp! 

Zip-lining Through the North GA Mountains

If your kids have a need for speed, ziplining is a thrilling way to experience the mountains. Several canopy tours in Blue Ridge offer kid-friendly ziplining courses that let them safely soar above the treetops. Ziplining is not only an exciting activity but also a great way to build confidence and appreciation for the world from a new perspective. 

Lakeside Adventures at Lake Blue Ridge

Spending a day by the water is always a hit with kids, and Morganton Point Recreation Area on Lake Blue Ridge offers a sandy beach where families can swim, paddleboard, enjoy a barbeque, and get some sun. The area is perfect for swimming in the refreshing waters or simply relaxing while enjoying the stunning scenery.

For families looking to get out on the water, Lake Blue Ridge Outfitters provide kayaks and paddleboards for an exciting day of exploring the lake. Another option is to rent a pontoon boat with Blue Ridge Boat Rentals or Toonz Boat Rentals! A day on the lake is perfect for fostering a love for water sports and outdoor exploration.

Tubing & Kayaking on the Toccoa River

One of the most relaxing yet exciting ways to enjoy the outdoors in Blue Ridge is tubing or kayaking on the Toccoa River. Several outfitters offer rentals and shuttle services, making it easy for families to enjoy a lazy float down the scenic river. The gentle currents make it perfect for young kids, and the stunning surroundings create a picture-perfect outdoor adventure. 

Horseback Riding Through the Mountains

For a true North Georgia mountain experience, take the kids horseback riding through the beautiful Blue Ridge forests. Several stables offer guided trail rides suited for beginners and younger riders. Horseback riding allows families to explore scenic trails at a leisurely pace while connecting with these gentle animals. It’s an unforgettable way to experience the beauty of Blue Ridge. Knowledgeable guides ensure that even first-time riders feel comfortable and confident in the saddle, making this a fantastic family-friendly adventure.

Action-Packed Fun at Blue Ridge Paintball

For older kids and teens looking for an adrenaline rush, Blue Ridge Paintball is the perfect spot for some outdoor excitement. This family-friendly paintball course offers a thrilling experience with strategic games and team-based challenges. It’s a great way for kids to burn off energy! With different game scenarios and various obstacles to navigate, every round offers a new and exciting challenge.

Plan Your Family Vacation in Blue Ridge, GA

Blue Ridge is a paradise for families who love the outdoors! With a wide range of activities suited for all ages, your kids will have endless opportunities to explore, learn, and create lasting memories. Whether mining for gems, floating down the Toccoa River, or zipping above the trees, Blue Ridge offers the perfect mix of adventure and memorability for a family getaway.

title: Outdoor Activities for Kids in Blue Ridge, GA
